news.summary: Endeavour Silver Corp. has successfully concluded its prospectus offering of common shares, which ended on April 8, 2025. The Underwriters have fully utilized their over-allotment option, purchasing an extra 1,285,000 Common Shares at a rate of US$3.88 per share. This move has brought in additional gross proceeds of US$4,985,800 for Endeavour Silver Corp., leading to a total gross income of roughly US$50.0 million from the offering.
news.headline: Endeavour Silver Corp. closes over-allotment option, sells 1,285,000 Common Shares at $3.88 each, raising total $50.0 million.
US in talks with Yemen forces on land offensive against Houthis.

news.summary: DeFi, or decentralized finance, holds immense potential to revolutionize financial services but is hindered by complex processes and terminology. DeFAI, a new integration of DeFi with agentic AI, aims to simplify this by allowing users to verbally command a chatbot to execute multi-step actions automatically. This could make handling crypto holdings easier and more accessible for retail traders. DeFAI could also enhance security by minimizing input errors, potentially empowering traders to act quickly on market insights. This innovation could pave the way for a more user-friendly and widespread adoption of DeFi in the financial sector.
news.headline: DeFAI integrates with AI to simplify DeFi for newcomers, automating on-chain actions via chatbot. Retail traders benefit.

news.summary: Thyim, a community-focused platform, is connecting neighbors in Oklahoma City to share time and help each other, transforming local communities with every small task. Launched on April 16, 2025, the platform operates under the motto "neighbors helping neighbors." Through Thyim.com, individuals can join forces, providing assistance and support in various tasks to improve community life. It aims to empower residents to come together in Oklahoma City and make a positive impact by fostering collaboration and camaraderie.
news.headline: Thyim debuts in OKC to connect neighbors for community assistance. Revolutionizing help, 16th April 2025. Visit thyim.com.

news.summary: PlayAI's audio data and voice-generating technology are being incorporated into Reality Defender's real-time audio system to enhance its AI detection capabilities further. This integration, announced on April 16, 2025, involves Reality Defender, a renowned deepfake detection platform based in New York, and PlayAI, a technology company headquartered in Palo Alto, California. The collaboration aims to improve the accuracy and efficiency of detecting manipulated audio by leveraging PlayAI's advanced tools. The partnership signifies a step forward in combatting the rising threats of deepfakes, benefiting users with cutting-edge protection.
news.headline: Reality Defender and PlayAI team up to tackle voice deepfakes with PlayAI technology integrated into Reality Defender platform.

news.summary: In Summit, New Jersey, Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.205 per share for its common stock. The dividend will be payable on May 28, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of May 14, 2025. Kenvue Inc. is recognized as the top consumer health company globally in terms of revenue, with well-known brands like Aveeno®, BAND-AID® Brand, and Johnson’s® under its umbrella, boasting over a century of history and heritage.
news.headline: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) to pay $0.205 per share dividend on May 28, 2025, to shareholders as of May 14, 2025.
Iraq plans oil export cut amid pressure to reach OPEC+ target.
Tresu Investment Holding A/S announces changes to its financial calendar for 2025. #Tresu #finance #2025

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Mayfield Village, Ohio, The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) shared their financial results for the month and quarter concluding on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Progressive Corp (NYSE:PGR) reported March 2025 results, including revenue and earnings for quarter ended March 31.
Iraq plans to cut crude oil shipments by 70k b/d in April.

news.summary: VanEck's head of research, Matthew Sigel, proposed the idea of "BitBonds" at the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Summit 2025, suggesting US Treasury bonds backed partially by Bitcoin. These new 10-year bonds would consist of 90% traditional US debt and 10% Bitcoin exposure, aiming to refinance an estimated $14 trillion in US debt in the next three years. The concept could offer investors potential gains exceeding break-even rates if Bitcoin performs well, with a maximum annualized yield to maturity of 4.5%. Sigel highlighted the benefits for both investors seeking protection from US dollar inflation and the government aiming to save money even if Bitcoin's value drops to zero. The proposal follows a similar pitch by the Bitcoin Policy Institute, estimating potential interest savings of $70 billion annually and $700 billion over ten years. The growing interest in crypto-backed bonds aligns with the US government's increasing openness to cryptocurrency under President Donald Trump's administration.
news.headline: Bitcoin may help US refinance $14T debt with new BitBonds - 90% traditional debt, 10% BTC. Potential $70B savings yearly.

news.summary: Jeff Goeser has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Omaha National in Nebraska. Goeser, who has prior experience at Orion and TD Ameritrade, joins the executive team to aid in the company's strategic expansion plans.
news.headline: Omaha National appoints new CFO Jeff Goeser to support growth, brings experience from Orion and TD Ameritrade.

news.summary: A groundbreaking educational guide called Nature Risk Made Simple has been unveiled by Dunya Analytics in Wilmington, Del., on April 16, 2025. This innovative guide aims to simplify biodiversity disclosures for companies, providing them with a clear and confident starting point. With the launch of this unique resource, companies now have access to a valuable tool to navigate the complexities of biodiversity reporting. Nature Risk Made Simple offers a comprehensive approach to understanding and addressing biodiversity risks, ultimately supporting companies in making informed decisions. The guide is set to revolutionize how companies approach biodiversity disclosures, offering a much-needed solution to meet their reporting obligations effectively. This initiative marks a significant step towards promoting greater transparency and accountability in corporate practices.
news.headline: Dunya Analytics launches Nature Risk Made Simple guide to aid companies in biodiversity reporting. (Characters: 95)

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in San Francisco, Immplify introduced its innovative AI-powered platform on www.immplify.com. The platform aims to simplify global mobility amidst tightening immigration policies and complex cross-border movement. Immplify's technology offers streamlined and secure solutions for individuals navigating these challenges. This development comes as a response to the growing need for simplified processes in light of global immigration issues.
news.headline: Immplify launches AI immigration platform amid tightening policies, simplifying global mobility.

news.summary: A single home design clinched two awards at the Suncoast Builders Association's yearly event in Tampa, Florida. Mattamy Homes, the largest privately owned homebuilder in North America, took home the prestigious Best Overall Multi-Family Home prize among others. This achievement was recognized at the event held on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: In Hellerup, Denmark on April 16, 2025, TORM plc (TRMD) disclosed the successful passing of all resolutions outlined in the notice for the Annual General Meeting dated March 17, 2025. The poll results from the meeting indicated that all resolutions were duly approved with significant support from attendees. The Company highlighted a strong show of unity among shareholders in favor of the proposed resolutions, signifying a positive outlook for future endeavors.

news.summary: A New York-based jewelry studio, DiCuore Diamonds, was established by Daniela Sokolowski, a breast cancer survivor and jewelry expert. The small business, like many others, is grappling with the uncertainties of the current economic landscape. Despite facing challenges, Daniela remains resilient in her entrepreneurial journey.
news.headline: DiCuore Diamonds aims to be U.S. military's top jeweler. Founded by cancer survivor, facing economic challenges.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 16, 2025, Walnut Hill Medical shared the news that David Kravitz, the CEO of Organ Recovery Systems, has become a member of its Board of Directors. With a strong background in medical technology, organ transplantation, and healthcare innovation, Mr. Kravitz's addition brings valuable expertise to the board.

news.summary: In Towson, Maryland, on April 16, 2025, Towson Endodontics revealed the release of their updated website, https://www.towsonendoassociates.com/. This newly revamped site aims to offer patients a better user experience, increased accessibility, and thorough information.

news.summary: Buff City Soap, a popular handmade, plant-based soap company, is excited to introduce its latest product, Body Wash, on April 22, 2025. The launch date coincides with Earth Day. The Body Wash will be available for purchase both in stores and online.

news.summary: The co-founder and CEO of Mantra, John Patrick Mullin, has stated that he will burn his OM tokens following the cryptocurrency's significant crash on Sunday.
news.headline: Mantra CEO to burn 90% of team tokens after significant OM crash claims John Patrick Mullin, co-founder.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Aditxt, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADTX) disclosed that its subsidiary Pearsanta, Inc. has obtained approval from WCG Clinical's Institutional Review Board (IRB) to commence a new clinical research. This study will assess the Mitomic® Endometriosis Test (MET), a pioneering blood-based diagnostic tool created to assist in the early identification of endometriosis. The approval obtained is an important milestone for Aditxt, showcasing its commitment to advancing health innovations.
news.headline: Pearsanta, a subsidiary of Aditxt, got IRB approval to begin a clinical study for a blood-based test for endometriosis in May 2025.
Secretary of State Rubio, Ambassador Steve Witkoff to travel to Paris, April 16-18 for talks with European counterparts regarding Trump’s goal to end the Russia-Ukraine war.

news.summary: REI Systems, based in Sterling, Va., achieved a significant milestone on April 16, 2025, by successfully meeting the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) requirements. With over 35 years of experience in providing cutting-edge technology solutions to the federal government, REI Systems is now on track to become a third-party assessor. This accomplishment demonstrates their commitment to cybersecurity excellence.
news.headline: REI Systems in Sterling, VA passes CMMC Level 2 assessment, aiming to become third-party assessor. Over 35 years of federal tech solutions experience.

news.summary: Ritedose has recently invested in a state-of-the-art packaging line that has effectively doubled its capacity to package single, individually wrapped vial medications. This new Syntegon line is a crucial addition as it will greatly support Ritedose's manufacturing efforts for Verona Pharma's latest COPD drug, Ohtuvayre, as well as for certain ophthalmic medications. This significant development took place in Columbia, South Carolina on April 16th, showcasing Ritedose's dedication to meeting the growing demand for these essential medications.
news.headline: Ritedose boosts single vial packaging capacity by adding 7th Syntegon line. Supports COPD drug Ohtuvayre production.

news.summary: The gold prices have seen a remarkable rally, with gold fund net inflows reaching a record $80 billion year-to-date, double the previous high in 2020. Investors are increasingly putting money into gold as market uncertainty rises, as per the BofA Global Investment Strategy report. The Gold Spot US Dollar price has surged by 25.95% since December 31, 2024, reaching $3,304.80 per ounce, hitting a record high of $3,318 per ounce. Additionally, World Gold Council data for the first quarter revealed Gold ETFs saw an inflow of 226.5 metric tons worth $21.1 billion, the largest since Q1 of 2022. Gold ETF holdings rose by 3% to 3,445.3 tons by March-end, the highest since May 2023. The article also discussed further details available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Gold fund inflows hit record $80 billion in 2025, doubling 2020 high. Gold prices surged to $3,304.80/ounce, up 25.95% from $2,623.81. World Gold Council reports 226.5 metric tons inflow worth $21.1 billion in Q1, increasing holdings by 3% to 3,445.3 tons.

news.summary: Vale S.A. (NYSE: VALE) recently released its first-quarter results for FY25, indicating a production of 67.7 million tonnes (Mt) of iron ore, a 4.5% decrease from the previous year. The dip in production was attributed to heavy rainfall affecting operations in the Northern System. Pellet production also saw a decline of 15% Y/Y, totaling 7.2 Mt due to limited pellet feed availability. Despite the production setbacks, Vale experienced a 3.6% increase in iron ore sales during the same period. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Vale's Q1 iron ore output drops 4.5% to 67.7 million tonnes due to heavy rains. Copper and nickel output increases. Ore sales up 3.6%.

news.summary: Blue Foundry Bancorp (BLFY) will be revealing its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025, on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. As the holding company for Blue Foundry Bank, the announcement will be accessible on the Company’s website and the SEC’s website. Investors and stakeholders can find the detailed earnings release on https://ir.bluefoundrybank.com/ or on https://www.sec.gov/. This update from Rutherford, N.J. signifies a significant milestone for BLFY, traded on the NASDAQ.
news.headline: Blue Foundry Bancorp to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025. Check out the report on company website or SEC site.

news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on April 16, 2025, Tompkins Ventures introduced its new ReGlobalization toolkit and process to assist companies in navigating supply chain restructuring in order to succeed in the face of inflation, potential recession, and stock market fluctuations. The toolkit offers a comprehensive solution for businesses, including tools and strategies to optimize supply chains and mitigate risks. This launch aims to address the challenges presented by market uncertainties and help companies adapt and thrive.
news.headline: Tompkins Ventures launches ReGlobalization toolkit to guide companies through supply chain redesigns amid uncertainties.

news.summary: A company based in Boca Raton, Florida, ModMed® is making a significant investment in the field of eye care. They are offering access to their ophthalmology-focused Electronic Health Record (EHR) system to three community colleges in Illinois.
news.headline: ModMed donates EHR access to 3 Illinois community colleges to empower future ophthalmic technicians.

news.summary: Tyfone, a digital banking provider, revealed today that CCBank has selected the nFinia® Digital Banking Platform for its digital banking services. CCBank, based in Utah with assets surpassing $1 billion and six branches statewide, aimed to partner with a forward-thinking digital banking provider. Their decision was driven by the desire to provide customers with a modern, user-friendly interface and intuitive digital banking products as the bank continues to expand and innovate.

news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is currently experiencing a surge in on-chain activity and burn rates, despite price consolidation. The cryptocurrency is priced at $0.00001163 with a market cap of $6.9 billion, showing a 7-day positive trend of 6.2% but a 24-hour decrease of 2.9%. Comparatively, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.1534 with a market cap of $22.8 billion, showcasing a 7-day negative trend of 5% and a 24-hour drop of 4.07%. Another cryptocurrency, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE), is priced at $0.057127 with a market cap of $2.99 billion, displaying a 7-day decrease of 12.4% and a 24-hour decrease of 3.2%. Crypto trader Javon Marks is optimistic about SHIB, setting a breakout target at $0.000081, which reflects a potential increase of over 550%. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Shiba Inu burns 60 million SHIB in one transaction amid increased activity. Prices: $0.00001163, market cap $6.9 billion.

news.summary: In Alexandria, Va., global business travel professionals are facing challenges due to recent US government actions, such as tariffs, cross-border policies, and entry restrictions. This has created uncertainty about the impact on business travel for 2025. A poll conducted by the Global Business Travel Association (GBTA) surveyed over 900 industry respondents and found that many are expecting declines in business travel volume, spending, and revenue. This situation highlights the need for professionals to adapt to a complex and changing landscape in the industry.
news.headline: 1/3 Global Travel Managers predict significant decrease in 2025 business travel due to US govt policies.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, the American Liver Foundation (ALF) announced the upcoming Liver Life Advocacy Summit in Washington, D.C., scheduled for April 29 and 30. The event aims to unite individuals impacted by liver disease, including patients, caregivers, and family members, to advocate for ALF's mission. This gathering will bring together a significant number of participants from various regions nationwide to raise awareness and address the challenges associated with liver health.
news.headline: ALF to host Liver Life Advocacy Summit in Wash. DC on Apr 29-30 for patients, caregivers, family members affected by liver disease.

news.summary: A global gathering will be held to increase understanding and unite individuals affected by RRP along with the healthcare professionals assisting them. RRP is a rare, long-lasting condition caused primarily by HPV 6/11, affecting both children and adults.

news.summary: Chicago - On April 16, 2025, Assembly Health, a prominent revenue cycle management company serving numerous physician practices, post-acute facilities, and behavioral health facilities, announced the appointment of Greg Shorten as Chief Commercial Officer and Michael Murphy as Chief Financial Officer. news.summary: In Dundalk, Ireland, Cimpress plc (Nasdaq: CMPR) has scheduled a public Q&A call for Thursday, May 1, 2025, at 8:00 am ET. The live call will be accessible at ir.cimpress.com, with a replay available afterward at the same link. Questions can be submitted live via chat during the call, and investors also have the option to presubmit questions before 11:00 pm ET on the previous day.

news.summary: Minneapolis-based company SunOpta Inc. has announced the scheduling of the release of their first quarter financial results for 2025 along with a conference call. This event will provide insight into the company's performance during the initial months of the year. Stakeholders and investors are encouraged to participate in the conference call to gain valuable information on SunOpta Inc.'s financial position and strategic outlook moving forward. Stay tuned for specific dates and details regarding this important event.
news.headline: SunOpta Inc. in Minneapolis to release first quarter 2025 financial results and hold conference call.

news.summary: Investors with a focus on healthcare are showing their support for Xtant Medical Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: XTNT) by backing the company's strategic vision to enhance their orthobiologics segment, which offers higher margins. This support comes as Xtant Medical announces new product launches. The company, headquartered in BELGRADE, Mont., revealed these updates on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Xtant Medical reports 18-19% revenue growth in Q1 2025, announces secondary private sale by OrbiMed. Investors back shift to orthobiologics.

news.summary: BlueLinx Holdings Inc. (NYSE: BXC), a prominent U.S. wholesale distributor of building products, is set to release its first quarter 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025, after the market closes. The company will hold a conference call on April 30, 2025, at 10:00 AM ET to discuss the results, led by Shyam Reddy, President and CEO, and Kimberly DeBrock, VP, Chief Accounting Officer, and Interim Principal Financial Officer. The call will be available via webcast.
